objective: Diagnose Flask 500 error on /api/chat. The frontend is now reaching the server (CORS fixed) but getting a 500 response. Check the Flask log and identify the crash cause.
required_validation: Send a test POST to /api/chat locally and capture the full response and any traceback
Report the exact exception and line number causing the 500
execution_instructions: Start with cd ~/mide-pilot && git pull --ff-only origin main
Run a local test POST: curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message": "hello", "session_id": null}' and capture full output
If the log does not show the error, check: curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message": "hello"}' -v 2>&1 | tail -40
Write pilot_v1/results/TASK-0013.result.json with the log tail and curl response
git add, git commit -m 'worker: TASK-0013 result — Flask 500 diagnostic', git push
